name: PongFu
description: PongFu Master the Paddle. Embrace the Panda. Welcome to PongFu, the ultimate ping-pong adventure set in a vibrant panda world! Step into a bamboo-filled arena where reflexes, timing, and a little kung-fu spirit determine who rules the table. Play as an energetic panda warrior, spinning, smashing, and slicing your way to victory with lightning-fast paddle skills. Fast-Paced Panda Action Every match is a test of precision and speed. Curve the ball, unleash powerful smashes, and outsmart opponents with clever angles. The better your timing, the stronger your shots!
